title: Economic

simpleExplanation.title: The economic climate
simpleExplanation.summary: GDP growth, inflation, interest rates, and exchange rates influence demand, costs, and investment decisions.

sections.content: **Economic PESTLE** (6.1.2) links **9708 macro** concepts to **business strategy**. Quote **case data** where given.
